titleStmt.title: SII 23.304: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 304. (A.R. No. 304 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahālingasvāmi temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa I: year 26: 1096-97 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription commences with the introduction Pugaḻ śūḻnda puṇari etc. It is dated in the 172nd day of the regnal year quoted, and records the gift of 180 sheep for burning three perpetual lamps in the temple, by queen Śīrāmaṉ Arumoḻinaṅgaiyār alias Ēḻulagumuḍaiyār. The shepherds who received them were to measure out 3 uḻakku of ghee by the liquid measure Ēkanāyakaṉ, every day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponṉemi Aḷavum tanṉemi ṉaṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāṟ putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai Īṭṭam vayirākarattu vāriayilmuṉai kontaḷavaraicar tantaṉamāṭa vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷvali kāṭṭi porāṭa parinaṭātti kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭi teṉṟicai temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannilappāvai taṉimaiyum tavirttu punitaṟtirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi taṉṉaṭiyiraṇṭum taṭamuṭiyāka tonnilaventar cūṭi muṉṉai maṉuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟappa ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai ṟirunilaviḷākam meṅkaṇun taṉātu tiruniḻal ve
ṇṇilāt tikaḻa vorutaṉimeruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟ ṟivān tarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutanta kalañcoṟi kaḷuṟumuṟai niṟpa viḷaṅkiya piṟkulappiṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyeṉṉu colletirk koṭiṟṟallatu taṉkaivil letirkkoṭā vikkalak kallakar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena tuṅkapattirai pukat turatti veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tanmānamuṅ kūṟiya viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷum mutukuneḷippa Iḻitta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷum talaivirittalamara kuṭaticai tannāḷukantu tāṉum tāṉaiyum pannārāṭṭa palpala mutukum payattetir māṟiya jaya
ntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻum celviyum vāḷāreṇkaṇ maṭan taiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkariniraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇameṉṉum paraṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaiṇṭiṉap pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷvaru parit tāṅkalum poru parikkulaṅkaḷum tantiravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal teṉkaṭal paṭarvatupol taṉ peruñceṉaiyai yevi pañcavar Aiyvarum poruta porkaḷattañci veruvi neḷittoṭi Araṇeṉa pukak kāṭaṟittu pattu nāṭaṭipaṭuttu maṟṟavartammai vaṉa carartariyum poṟṟai veñcurameṟṟi koṟṟa vijaiyastambham ticai toṟum niṟutti
muttin calāpamum muttamiṭ potiyalu mattaveṅkari Imaiyyac caiyvamu mākkiyuṅ kaikkoṇṭu venāṭṭellaikāṭṭi kuṭamalaināṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟe(raiye)llām taṉivicumpeṟa māveṟiya varutaṉit talaivarai kuṟuṅkalar kulaiya koṭṭāṟuppaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷ Iṭṭaruḷi maṟipuṉal kaliṅkamaṇṭalamuṅ kaiyppaṭuttaruḷi tiṟalkoḷ Āramum tiruppuyattalaṅkalumpol viramum tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārtoḻa civa niṭattumaiyeṉa tiṉacintāmaṇi puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭaṉ kaṅkai viṟṟirunta maṅkayartilatam Eḻicaivallavi Eḻulakumuṭaiyāḷ vāḻi Amarntiṉitiruppa Ūḻiyum tirumālukantu piriyāteṉa tirumakaḷ tikaḻḻeṉat tiyākavalli tarum Ulakuṭaiyāḷiruppa
marapiṉil puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirāja kecaripanmarāna śakkaravartthikaḷ śrīkulattuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6Āvatu ..yāṇṭu Irupattāṟāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟeḻupat tiraṇṭiṉāl Ulakuyyakkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyārkku tirunontāviḷakkukku nampi rāṭṭiyār cirāman Arumoḻi naṅkaiyārāṉa Eḻulakumuṭaiyār vaitta tirunontāviḷakkuk kalveṭṭuvikkaveṉṟu tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār patipātamulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyarkkum tevarkanmikaḷukkum tirai mur sabhaiyārkkumm tiruviṭaimarutil
nakarattārkkum tiraimūr Ūrārkkum śrīkāriyam vaṭacāttamaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ kūttaṉ comatevanāṉa kanta pāṇi muventaveḷā ṉukkum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi pāratāyaṉ Eṭuttapātam Iṉ puṟṟiruntānāṉa poṟkoyilnampikkum karaṇattāṉukkum pirasātam ceytaruḷi śrīmukam varat talaimeṟkoṇṭu pirasātappaṭṭu nampirāṭ ṭiyār cirāmaṉ Arumoḻinaṅkaiyār Eḻulakumuṭaiyār vaitta tirunontāviḷakku muṉṟukku vaitta Āṭu nūṟṟeṇpatu koṇṭu nicatam Ekanāyakaṉāl muvuḻakku neyyaṭṭuvatāka kaikkoṇṭom
maṉṟāṭi tāmotiraṉ veṇkāṭaṉum tevaṉ Iṭaṅkoṇṭāṉum marutan tevaṉum paṭṭaṉpeṟṟāṉum Inta Āṭu nūṟṟeṇpatuṅ koṇṭu nicatam Ekanāyakanāl muvuḻakku ney śantirādittaval In ney taṇṭi Ittirunontāviḷakku muṉṟum Erippikkakkaṭavomā nom tevarkanmikaḷun=tiraimūr sabhaiyārum tiruviṭaimarutil nakarat tārum tiraimūr Ūrārum ..ivai śrīkoyil kaṇakku koṟṟamaṅ kalamuṭaiyāṉ Arumoḻi poṟkāriyeṉ Eḻuttu Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ...
Digital edition of SII 23.304 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
